headline: SONNET 5 BENCHMARKS LAND MIXED — EDGES OPUS 4.8 ON SOME TASKS, SCORES BELOW OLDER SONNET 4.6 ON CYBER EXPLOIT-FINDING
GITLAB DUO SHIPS SONNET 5 ACROSS ALL TIERS — FIRST MODEL TO CLEAR FULL BENCHMARK SUITE, UP 93.8% OVER PREDECESSOR
SONNET 5 RUNS ~60 TOK/S VS GLM 5.2'S CLAIMED 150-300 — CHINESE MODELS REOPEN PRICE/SPEED GAP ON ANTHROPIC
